name: noteflow-monorepo-root
description: Repo root: satisfies Next.js detection; build delegates to NoteFlow/src/frontend. In Vercel, Root Directory can be repo root (empty) or NoteFlow/src/frontend — if frontend-only, clear custom install/build so defaults use that folder.

scripts.build: npm --prefix NoteFlow/src/backend install --include=dev --no-audit --no-fund && npm --prefix NoteFlow/src/frontend install --include=dev --no-audit --no-fund && npm --prefix NoteFlow/src/frontend run build
